name: AgentOps Status Quickstart Dashboard Canary
description: Offline public canary for status and quickstart operator dashboards: shared/Codex validators, CLI helper behavior, live status JSON latency, quickstart help, state-aware next actions, and Codex prompt contracts.

cases.title: Shared/Codex status and quickstart validators pass
cases.objective: Keep status and quickstart skill validators healthy across shared and Codex artifacts, including semantic onboarding detection for Codex quickstart.

inputs.shell: bash skills/status/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills-codex/status/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills/quickstart/scripts/validate.sh && bash skills-codex/quickstart/scripts/validate.sh

cases.title: Status and quickstart focused Go tests pass
cases.objective: Protect status output helpers, bounded status flywheel latency, quickstart helper behavior, init/quick-start flows, and status JSON validity.

cases.title: Built status JSON and quickstart help return within latency budget
cases.objective: Catch live command regressions that unit tests can miss: status must emit JSON quickly in this repo, and quick-start help must remain callable from the built binary.

inputs.shell: tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; (cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go build -o "$tmp/ao" ./cmd/ao); timeout 15 "$tmp/ao" status --json >"$tmp/status.json"; jq -e 'type == "object" and has("initialized") and has("base_dir")' "$tmp/status.json" >/dev/null; timeout 10 "$tmp/ao" quick-start --help >/dev/null; echo status-quickstart-cli-ok

cases.title: Status dashboard preserves state gathering, JSON, and next-action contracts
cases.objective: Ensure status remains a single-screen operator dashboard with parallel state gathering, JSON output, quality signals, and ordered next-action rules.

expectations.value: Run ALL of the following in parallel bash calls for speed
status should remain an operator dashboard

cases.title: Quickstart preserves setup detection and one-next-action onboarding
cases.objective: Lock quickstart's setup detector, exact AgentOps explanation, decision-table recommendations, Codex lifecycle guidance, and semantic onboarding validator.

expectations.value: Tell a new user what AgentOps does and what to do first
Match the first row that applies. Output that message
AgentOps is the operational layer for coding agents.
